name: Kyubimon (Silver)

signature_move.name: Koenryuu
signature_move.description: Creates a burning dragon out of blue flames from its tails and incinerates the enemy.

description: A subspecies of Kyubimon whose fur is silver. Although it's less intelligent than Kyubimon , it seems to have excellent speed. Digimon World -next 0rder- ⇨ English キュウビモンの亜種で、体毛の色が銀色。キュウビモンよりも知性は劣るものの、速度に優れる様だ。 デジモンワールド -next 0rder-
